zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice V de CRAON於大約1239年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易a特萊薩時，他的父親Maurice IV de Craon27歲，母親Isabelle de Lusignan16歲。他於1276年1月與Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年2月26日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CRAON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice V de CRAON was born about 1239, in Châtelais, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Maurice IV de Craon, was 27 and his mother, Isabelle de Lusignan, was 16. He married Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN in January 1276. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 February 1292, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 54.

Il a épousé Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN en janvier 1276. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 février 1292, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Er hat im Januar 1276 Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. ko.lifeSummary: Maurice V de CRAON(이)가 대략 1239년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 cha텔아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice IV de Craon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Lusignan(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1276년 1월 Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 2월 26일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice V de CRAON родился около 1239 г. в местности чaтелеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Maurice IV de Craon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Lusignan, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mahaut BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN январь 1276 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 февраля 1292 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.
